bibleCharacters.name: Adam
bibleCharacters.meaning: man, mankind; the first human created by God.

bibleCharacters.name: Eve
bibleCharacters.meaning: life-giver; the mother of all living.

bibleCharacters.name: Noah
bibleCharacters.meaning: rest or comfort; righteous man preserved through the flood.

bibleCharacters.name: Abraham
bibleCharacters.meaning: father of a multitude; patriarch of the covenant people.

bibleCharacters.name: Sarah
bibleCharacters.meaning: princess; wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac.

bibleCharacters.name: Isaac
bibleCharacters.meaning: he laughs; son of Abraham through whom the covenant continues.

bibleCharacters.name: Jacob
bibleCharacters.meaning: heel holder; later named Israel, father of the twelve tribes.

bibleCharacters.name: Moses
bibleCharacters.meaning: drawn out; prophet who delivered Israel and gave the law.

bibleCharacters.name: Aaron
bibleCharacters.meaning: exalted one; brother of Moses and first high priest of Israel.

bibleCharacters.name: Joshua
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh is salvation; successor of Moses who led Israel into Canaan.

bibleCharacters.name: Deborah
bibleCharacters.meaning: bee; prophetess and judge who led Israel to victory.

bibleCharacters.name: Gideon
bibleCharacters.meaning: hewer; judge who defeated Midian with a small army.

bibleCharacters.name: Samson
bibleCharacters.meaning: sun-like; judge known for supernatural strength.

bibleCharacters.name: Ruth
bibleCharacters.meaning: friend; Moabite woman who became ancestor of David.

bibleCharacters.name: Samuel
bibleCharacters.meaning: heard of God; prophet who anointed Israel's first kings.

bibleCharacters.name: Saul
bibleCharacters.meaning: asked for; the first king of Israel.

bibleCharacters.name: David
bibleCharacters.meaning: beloved; king of Israel and ancestor of Messiah.

bibleCharacters.name: Solomon
bibleCharacters.meaning: peaceful; king known for wisdom who built the temple.

bibleCharacters.name: Elijah
bibleCharacters.meaning: my God is Yahweh; prophet who opposed Baal worship.

bibleCharacters.name: Elisha
bibleCharacters.meaning: God is salvation; successor to Elijah performing many miracles.

bibleCharacters.name: Isaiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh saves; prophet who foretold the coming Messiah.

bibleCharacters.name: Jeremiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh will raise up; prophet who warned Judah before exile.

bibleCharacters.name: Ezekiel
bibleCharacters.meaning: God strengthens; prophet of visions during exile.

bibleCharacters.name: Daniel
bibleCharacters.meaning: God is my judge; prophet known for visions and faith in Babylon.

bibleCharacters.name: Hosea
bibleCharacters.meaning: salvation; prophet whose life illustrated God's faithful love for Israel.

bibleCharacters.name: Joel
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh is God; prophet who foretold the outpouring of the Spirit.

bibleCharacters.name: Amos
bibleCharacters.meaning: burden bearer; prophet who proclaimed God's justice.

bibleCharacters.name: Obadiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: servant of Yahweh; prophet declaring judgment on Edom.

bibleCharacters.name: Jonah
bibleCharacters.meaning: dove; prophet sent to preach repentance to Nineveh.

bibleCharacters.name: Micah
bibleCharacters.meaning: who is like Yahweh; prophet proclaiming justice and mercy.

bibleCharacters.name: Nahum
bibleCharacters.meaning: comfort; prophet declaring Nineveh's destruction.

bibleCharacters.name: Habakkuk
bibleCharacters.meaning: embrace; prophet who wrestled with God's justice.

bibleCharacters.name: Zephaniah
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh hides; prophet warning of coming judgment.

bibleCharacters.name: Haggai
bibleCharacters.meaning: festive; prophet urging the rebuilding of the temple.

bibleCharacters.name: Zechariah
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh remembers; prophet of visions and future restoration.

bibleCharacters.name: Malachi
bibleCharacters.meaning: my messenger; prophet announcing the coming messenger of the Lord.

bibleCharacters.name: Mary
bibleCharacters.meaning: Mary; the woman chosen to bear Jesus the Messiah.

bibleCharacters.name: Joseph of Nazareth
bibleCharacters.meaning: Joseph; earthly guardian of Jesus and husband of Mary.

bibleCharacters.name: John the Baptist
bibleCharacters.meaning: John; prophet preparing the way for the Messiah.

bibleCharacters.name: Jesus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Yahweh saves; the Son of God and Savior of the world.

bibleCharacters.name: Peter
bibleCharacters.meaning: rock; leading apostle among the disciples.

bibleCharacters.name: Andrew
bibleCharacters.meaning: manly; disciple who first followed Jesus and brought others.

bibleCharacters.name: James son of Zebedee
bibleCharacters.meaning: James; one of the twelve apostles and early martyr.

bibleCharacters.name: John
bibleCharacters.meaning: John; apostle and author of the Gospel and Revelation.

bibleCharacters.name: Philip
bibleCharacters.meaning: lover of horses; apostle and later evangelist.

bibleCharacters.name: Bartholomew
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Tolmai; one of the twelve apostles.

bibleCharacters.name: Matthew
bibleCharacters.meaning: gift of God; tax collector turned apostle and gospel writer.

bibleCharacters.name: Thomas
bibleCharacters.meaning: twin; apostle known for doubting before believing.

bibleCharacters.name: James son of Alphaeus
bibleCharacters.meaning: James; one of the twelve disciples of Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Thaddaeus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Thaddaeus; one of the twelve apostles of Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Simon the Zealot
bibleCharacters.meaning: Simon; disciple known for zeal.

bibleCharacters.name: Judas Iscariot
bibleCharacters.meaning: Judas; disciple who betrayed Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Mary Magdalene
bibleCharacters.meaning: woman from Magdala who witnessed Jesus' resurrection.

bibleCharacters.name: Lazarus
bibleCharacters.meaning: man raised from the dead by Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Martha
bibleCharacters.meaning: sister of Lazarus known for service.

bibleCharacters.name: Caiaphas
bibleCharacters.meaning: Jewish high priest involved in Jesus' trial.

bibleCharacters.name: Pontius Pilate
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman governor who authorized the crucifixion of Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Barnabas
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of encouragement; missionary companion of Paul.

bibleCharacters.name: Stephen
bibleCharacters.meaning: crown; first Christian martyr.

bibleCharacters.name: Philip the Evangelist
bibleCharacters.meaning: early evangelist who preached in Samaria.

bibleCharacters.name: Paul
bibleCharacters.meaning: Paul; missionary apostle to the Gentiles.

bibleCharacters.name: Ananias of Damascus
bibleCharacters.meaning: disciple who baptized Saul after his conversion.

bibleCharacters.name: Timothy
bibleCharacters.meaning: honoring God; companion and disciple of Paul.

bibleCharacters.name: Titus
bibleCharacters.meaning: trusted coworker of Paul and church leader.

bibleCharacters.name: Luke
bibleCharacters.meaning: physician and author of Luke and Acts.

bibleCharacters.name: Mark
bibleCharacters.meaning: John Mark; companion of Peter and gospel author.

bibleCharacters.name: Silas
bibleCharacters.meaning: early Christian leader and missionary partner of Paul.

bibleCharacters.name: Apollos
bibleCharacters.meaning: learned preacher who powerfully taught the scriptures.

bibleCharacters.name: Priscilla
bibleCharacters.meaning: early Christian teacher who helped instruct Apollos.

bibleCharacters.name: Aquila
bibleCharacters.meaning: husband of Priscilla and missionary coworker.

bibleCharacters.name: Philemon
bibleCharacters.meaning: Christian leader addressed in Paul's letter about forgiveness.

bibleCharacters.name: Onesimus
bibleCharacters.meaning: runaway servant who became a Christian.

bibleCharacters.name: James
bibleCharacters.meaning: brother of Jesus and leader in the Jerusalem church.

bibleCharacters.name: Jude
bibleCharacters.meaning: brother of James who wrote the epistle of Jude.

bibleCharacters.name: Nicodemus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Pharisee who came to Jesus by night seeking truth.

bibleCharacters.name: Joseph of Arimathea
bibleCharacters.meaning: member of the council who buried Jesus.

bibleCharacters.name: Gamaliel
bibleCharacters.meaning: respected Pharisee and teacher of the law.

bibleCharacters.name: Cornelius
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman centurion who became one of the first Gentile believers.

bibleCharacters.name: Lydia
bibleCharacters.meaning: seller of purple cloth who believed the gospel.

bibleCharacters.name: Festus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman governor who heard Paul's case.

bibleCharacters.name: Herod the Great
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who ruled Judea during Jesus' birth.

bibleCharacters.name: Herod Antipas
bibleCharacters.meaning: ruler who executed John the Baptist.

bibleCharacters.name: Herod Agrippa I
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who persecuted the early church.

bibleCharacters.name: Herod Agrippa II
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who heard Paul's defense.

bibleCharacters.name: Herodias
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Herod who demanded John the Baptist's death.

bibleCharacters.name: Crispus
bibleCharacters.meaning: leader of the synagogue who believed in Christ.

bibleCharacters.name: Sosthenes
bibleCharacters.meaning: synagogue ruler who later joined the Christian community.

bibleCharacters.name: Tychicus
bibleCharacters.meaning: trusted companion who delivered Paul's letters.

bibleCharacters.name: Epaphroditus
bibleCharacters.meaning: messenger who served Paul and nearly died in ministry.

bibleCharacters.name: Epaphras
bibleCharacters.meaning: church leader devoted to prayer.

bibleCharacters.name: Demas
bibleCharacters.meaning: coworker of Paul who later abandoned the mission.

bibleCharacters.name: Alexander the Coppersmith
bibleCharacters.meaning: man who opposed Paul's ministry.

bibleCharacters.name: The Ethiopian Eunuch
bibleCharacters.meaning: royal official baptized by Philip.

bibleCharacters.name: Ananias (High Priest)
bibleCharacters.meaning: high priest who accused Paul.

bibleCharacters.name: Caesar Augustus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman emperor ruling during Jesus' birth.

bibleCharacters.name: Claudius
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman emperor mentioned in Acts.

bibleCharacters.name: Felix
bibleCharacters.meaning: governor who kept Paul imprisoned.

bibleCharacters.name: Drusilla
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Felix who heard Paul's teaching.

bibleCharacters.name: John (Revelation)
bibleCharacters.meaning: apostle who received the visions recorded in Revelation.

bibleCharacters.name: Abel
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Adam whose acceptable sacrifice pleased God

bibleCharacters.name: Cain
bibleCharacters.meaning: firstborn son of Adam who killed his brother Abel

bibleCharacters.name: Seth
bibleCharacters.meaning: son given to Adam and Eve after Abel's death

bibleCharacters.name: Enoch
bibleCharacters.meaning: man who walked with God and was taken by Him

bibleCharacters.name: Lamech
bibleCharacters.meaning: father of Noah who foretold comfort through him

bibleCharacters.name: Lot
bibleCharacters.meaning: nephew of Abraham rescued from Sodom

bibleCharacters.name: Hagar
bibleCharacters.meaning: servant of Sarah and mother of Ishmael

bibleCharacters.name: Ishmael
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Abraham and Hagar

bibleCharacters.name: Rebekah
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Isaac and mother of Jacob and Esau

bibleCharacters.name: Esau
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Isaac who became father of Edom

bibleCharacters.name: Leah
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Jacob and mother of six tribes

bibleCharacters.name: Rachel
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Jacob and mother of Joseph and Benjamin

bibleCharacters.name: Judah
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Jacob whose tribe produced kings

bibleCharacters.name: Tamar
bibleCharacters.meaning: woman through whom Judah's lineage continued

bibleCharacters.name: Potiphar
bibleCharacters.meaning: Egyptian official who owned Joseph as servant

bibleCharacters.name: Asenath
bibleCharacters.meaning: Egyptian wife of Joseph

bibleCharacters.name: Ephraim
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Joseph who became a tribe of Israel

bibleCharacters.name: Manasseh
bibleCharacters.meaning: firstborn son of Joseph

bibleCharacters.name: Miriam
bibleCharacters.meaning: sister of Moses and Aaron who led worship

bibleCharacters.name: Zipporah
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Moses and daughter of Jethro

bibleCharacters.name: Jethro
bibleCharacters.meaning: priest of Midian and father-in-law of Moses

bibleCharacters.name: Korah
bibleCharacters.meaning: Levite who led rebellion against Moses

bibleCharacters.name: Balaam
bibleCharacters.meaning: diviner hired to curse Israel

bibleCharacters.name: Balak
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who hired Balaam to curse Israel

bibleCharacters.name: Phinehas
bibleCharacters.meaning: priest known for zeal for God's holiness

bibleCharacters.name: Bezalel
bibleCharacters.meaning: artisan who built the tabernacle

bibleCharacters.name: Oholiab
bibleCharacters.meaning: assistant artisan of the tabernacle

bibleCharacters.name: Barak
bibleCharacters.meaning: military leader under Deborah

bibleCharacters.name: Jael
bibleCharacters.meaning: woman who defeated Sisera

bibleCharacters.name: Abimelech
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Gideon who seized power

bibleCharacters.name: Jephthah
bibleCharacters.meaning: judge who delivered Israel from Ammon

bibleCharacters.name: Delilah
bibleCharacters.meaning: woman who betrayed Samson

bibleCharacters.name: Jonathan
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Saul and loyal friend of David

bibleCharacters.name: Michal
bibleCharacters.meaning: daughter of Saul and wife of David

bibleCharacters.name: Abigail
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of David known for wisdom

bibleCharacters.name: Bathsheba
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of David and mother of Solomon

bibleCharacters.name: Nathan
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet who rebuked David

bibleCharacters.name: Joab
bibleCharacters.meaning: military commander of David

bibleCharacters.name: Absalom
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of David who rebelled

bibleCharacters.name: Ahab
bibleCharacters.meaning: king of Israel who promoted idolatry

bibleCharacters.name: Jezebel
bibleCharacters.meaning: queen who promoted Baal worship

bibleCharacters.name: Hezekiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who restored worship

bibleCharacters.name: Josiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: king who restored the law

bibleCharacters.name: Shadrach
bibleCharacters.meaning: Hebrew exile delivered from the furnace

bibleCharacters.name: Meshach
bibleCharacters.meaning: companion of Daniel faithful to God

bibleCharacters.name: Abednego
bibleCharacters.meaning: servant of God delivered from the furnace

bibleCharacters.name: Ezra
bibleCharacters.meaning: priest who restored the law after exile

bibleCharacters.name: Nehemiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: leader who rebuilt Jerusalem's walls

bibleCharacters.name: Esther
bibleCharacters.meaning: queen who saved the Jewish people

bibleCharacters.name: Mordecai
bibleCharacters.meaning: cousin and protector of Esther

bibleCharacters.name: Haman
bibleCharacters.meaning: enemy of the Jews in Persia
